log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Reborn — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Reborn — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Reborn — Winged Striker.
→ Reborn — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 32/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Reborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
